# When to Buy BTC
> Free Bitcoin market signal for long-term holders. Combines the Fear & Greed Index, 200-day moving average, and ATH distance into a single Accumulate / Hold / Caution signal. No trading advice. No noise.

## About
- Tool: https://whentobuybtc.xyz/
- Language: English and German (DACH audience)
- Free to use, no account required

## Author
- Imo Babics — https://imobabics.com

## Key sections
- [Signal](https://whentobuybtc.xyz/#signal) — Current Bitcoin market signal based on three indicators
- [What If?](https://whentobuybtc.xyz/#whatif) — Calculator showing the compounding value of small daily habits redirected into Bitcoin

## Partners
- Relai — Bitcoin-only savings app (https://relai.me/imo)
- Trezor — Hardware wallet (https://trezorio.refr.cc/default/u/orange)
